mapper.select: SELECT category_code, category_name, description FROM result_form_category ORDER BY category_code

SELECT id, owner_type, owner_key, field_key, field_label, field_type, required, sort_order, placeholder, max_length, options_json FROM result_form_field WHERE owner_type = #{ownerType} AND owner_key = #{ownerKey} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM result_form_field WHERE owner_type = #{ownerType} AND owner_key = #{ownerKey}
